summary: The patient has a history of multiple conditions, including acute viral pharyngitis, hypertension, and chronic pain. There is evidence of obesity with a body mass index of 30+. The patient's blood pressure was elevated on two visits, while their pain severity varied across different encounters. Laboratory results show a range of values, but no significant trends are evident. The patient has been prescribed several medications to manage their conditions.
medications: NuvaRing 0.12/0.015 MG per 24HR 21 Day Vaginal Ring

labs.name: Platelet mean volume [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
